ValidationRule.description: Activating the Contract only if required MC Fields filled in.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISPICKVAL(Status, "activated"), ISPICKVAL(Backend__c, "Merchant Center"), OR( ISBLANK(BankAccountHolder__c), ISBLANK(BankInstitution__c), ISBLANK(BIC__c), ISBLANK(IBAN__c), ISBLANK(Commission__c), ISPICKVAL(ConnectionType__c, "") ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: For the status 'activated', all Merchant Centre mandatory fields must be completed.
